scripts.build: pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:server
scripts.build:docker: node -e "const { execFileSync, spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const { name } = require('./package.json'); const date = new Date(); const dateTag = [date.getFullYear(), String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'), String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')].join(''); const commitTag = execFileSync('git', ['rev-parse', 'HEAD'], { encoding: 'utf8' }).trim().slice(0, 8); const image = ['luzixu', name].join('/'); const images = ['latest', dateTag, commitTag].map(tag => [image, tag].join(':')); function run(args) { const result = spawnSync('docker', args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.status !== 0) process.exit(result.status ?? 1); } run(['build', ...images.flatMap(image => ['-t', image]), '.']); images.forEach(image => run(['push', image]));"
scripts.check:hono: pnpm run build:client && cross-env NODE_ENV=development BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=8dbe993c00f14b4d8ed69ff4b8e35fc785c7b4eab6824bccb3ea285e7c94c105 BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost TRUSTED_CLIENT_IP_HEADER=x-forwarded-for tsx scripts/checkHonoApp.ts && cross-env NODE_ENV=production BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=8dbe993c00f14b4d8ed69ff4b8e35fc785c7b4eab6824bccb3ea285e7c94c105 BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost tsx scripts/checkHonoProduction.ts
scripts.fg: npm run format && git add . && git commit -m "feat: format"
scripts.migrate: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node scripts/ensureDatabaseFile.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node scripts/ensureDatabaseFile.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production node scripts/ensureDatabaseFile.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=production prisma migrate deploy
